steps.title: Use the colon signal
steps.content: The narrator says that at night she rehearsed the neighborhood map and set challenges. The colon after challenges signals that the underlined sentences list examples of those mental challenges.

steps.title: Reject absent functions
steps.content: A points to the telephone number, which is earlier background. C treats the underlined portion as actual directions, not imagined routes. D shifts to the mother, who is not part of the underlined examples. The answer is B.
